summary: CRITICAL: Grey Out Past Services feature NOT implemented in active components. The grey-out code exists in Events.jsx and Travel.jsx but these components are NOT used - the app routes to EventsSearch/EventsResults and TravelSearch/TravelResults instead, which lack the grey-out feature entirely.

critical.issue: Grey-out feature NOT implemented. Past events (dates: 2026-01-29, 2026-02-04, 2026-02-06) display with full colors and 'Get Tickets' buttons instead of greyed styling and 'Ended' buttons
critical.expected: Past events should have opacity: 0.5, grayscale filter, 'Past Event' badge, and 'Ended' button
critical.actual: All events display identically with 'Get Tickets' buttons regardless of date

critical.issue: Grey-out feature NOT implemented. Past departure times display with full colors and 'Select' buttons instead of greyed styling and 'Unavailable' buttons
critical.expected: Past routes should have opacity: 0.5, grayscale filter, 'Departed' message, and 'Unavailable' button
critical.actual: All routes display identically with 'Select' buttons regardless of departure time

integration_issues.issue: Events.jsx has grey-out code but is NOT used - app routes to EventsSearch.jsx and EventsResults.jsx instead
affected_selectors: /services/events routes to EventsSearch, /services/events/results routes to EventsResults

integration_issues.issue: Travel.jsx has grey-out code but is NOT used - app routes to TravelSearch.jsx and TravelResults.jsx instead
affected_selectors: /services/travel routes to TravelSearch, /services/travel/results routes to TravelResults

action_items: CRITICAL: Add isPast() check and grey-out styling to EventsResults.jsx EventCardGrid and EventCardList components
CRITICAL: Add isPast() check and grey-out styling to TravelResults.jsx TripCardGrid and TripCardList components
Import isPast from '@/utils/dateUtils' in both results components
Add 'Past Event' badge, 'Ended' button, opacity: 0.5, grayscale filter for past events in EventsResults.jsx
Add 'Departed' message, 'Unavailable' button, opacity: 0.5, grayscale filter for past routes in TravelResults.jsx
Block click navigation for past items (pointer-events-none or onClick check)
critical_code_review_comments: Events.jsx and Travel.jsx have correct grey-out implementation but are NOT being used by the app routing
EventsResults.jsx uses MOCK_EVENTS with 2025 dates which are all past relative to server time (Feb 2026)
TravelResults.jsx getMockTrips() doesn't include date information for past checking
The isPast() utility function in dateUtils.js is correctly implemented but not imported in the results components

success_rate.frontend: 0% - Grey-out feature completely missing from active components

context_for_next_testing_agent: Grey-out feature code exists in Events.jsx (lines 172-259) and Travel.jsx (lines 169-253) but these components are NOT used. The app routes /services/events to EventsSearch.jsx and /services/events/results to EventsResults.jsx. Similarly /services/travel routes to TravelSearch.jsx and /services/travel/results to TravelResults.jsx. The results components (EventsResults.jsx and TravelResults.jsx) need to be updated to include the isPast() check and grey-out styling. Database has 5 events: 3 past (2026-01-29, 2026-02-04, 2026-02-06) and 2 future (2026-02-08, 2026-02-09). Current server time is 2026-02-07.

events_page_grey_out.test: Past events should be greyed out with 'Past Event' badge and 'Ended' button
events_page_grey_out.details: EventsResults.jsx does not implement grey-out feature. All 5 events show 'Get Tickets' buttons

events_click_blocking.test: Clicking past events should NOT navigate to booking
events_click_blocking.details: No click blocking implemented - all events are clickable

travel_page_grey_out.test: Past departure routes should be greyed out with 'Unavailable' button
travel_page_grey_out.details: TravelResults.jsx does not implement grey-out feature. All routes show 'Select' buttons

travel_click_blocking.test: Clicking past routes should NOT navigate to booking
travel_click_blocking.details: No click blocking implemented - all routes are clickable

rca_of_the_issue: Root Cause: The grey-out feature was implemented in Events.jsx and Travel.jsx components, but the app routing was changed to use EventsSearch/EventsResults and TravelSearch/TravelResults components instead. The new results components were not updated to include the grey-out feature. Reproduction: 1) Login as customer@test.com, 2) Navigate to /services/events, 3) Select city 'Yaoundé' and click 'Search Events', 4) Observe all events show 'Get Tickets' buttons including past events. Mitigation: Copy the isPast() check and grey-out styling from Events.jsx to EventsResults.jsx, and from Travel.jsx to TravelResults.jsx.
